patch:
--- a/parity_checker.vhd
+++ b/parity_checker.vhd
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
   signal parity_out : std_logic;
 
-  process(data_vector) is
+  process(data_vector, enable) is
   begin
     if enable = '1' then
       parity_out <= data_vector(0) xor data_vector(1) xor data_vector(2) xor data_vector(3) xor
